_publications._publicationTitle: Chemical genetic screens reveal defective lysosomal trafficking as synthetic lethal with NF1 loss.

_contextSnippet: Whereas cells treated with DMSO had a highly structured network of mitochondria, Y102-treated cells exhibited perinuclear clustering of the mitochondria, something not observed with HCQ
details: Y102-treated cells exhibited perinuclear clustering of mitochondria, not observed with HCQ treatment
